Welcome to Freetone,

You can now call and text any number in the US & Canada for free with your new number!

Try texting or calling your new number. Call your friends for free. Exchange free texts & picture messages with them from your new number. Even better, invite to FreeTone so that you can enjoy HD video calls with them.

You can still call more than 200 countries for free by earning free credits. Here is 10 bonus credits as a thank you :).

Happy texting & calling!
Call, text and videochat with your friends for free!
